parsed_response.title: The Robot's Dilemma
parsed_response.plot_summary: A human customer repeatedly asks for help from an overworked and tired service robot.
parsed_response.story: As a busy day at work comes to its peak, Robo finds itself inundated with requests. The Human Customer's persistent demands begin to wear on the already exhausted machine.
parsed_response.moral: The story teaches that understanding someone else’s perspective can lead to better communication and cooperation.
